metadata.page_title: Catachan Deathworld Veterans Imperial Guard Army List v2.7

special_rules.name: Oops! Sorry, sir!
special_rules.text: Catachan Deathworld Veteran armies include one Commissar for every 1000 points. If a Supreme Commander is present, the first Commissar must join that formation. Subsequent Commissars can be allocated to any unit in any order, though no formation may have more than one Commissar. Excess Commissars are lost.

special_rules.name: Booby Traps
special_rules.text: When defending during the first round of an assault, one unit in two with the Booby Traps rule gains First Strike on all weapons. Count units in the formation with Booby Traps and divide by two, rounding up, to find how many units gain First Strike.

formations.name: 0-1 Deathworld Air Cavalry Company
formations.units_text: 1 Imperial Guard Commander unit, plus 9 Catachan Infantry units, plus 5 Catachan Valkyries
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Any infantry upgrades must be equipped with Catachan Valkyries.
formations.raw_text: 0-1 Deathworld Air Cavalry Company | 1 Imperial Guard Commander unit, plus 9 Catachan Infantry units, plus 5 Catachan Valkyries | company upgrades | 450 points | Any infantry upgrades must be equipped with Catachan Valkyries

formations.units_text: 1 Imperial Guard Commander unit, plus 9 Catachan Infantry units

formations.units_text: 1 Supreme Commander unit, plus 9 Catachan Infantry units

formations.name: Infantry Platoon
formations.restrictions_or_notes: May include up to 3 Valkyries for +50 points each, up to minimum transport requirement.

formations.restrictions_or_notes: 0-1 per 1000 points. These units may be split up and added to the Regimental HQ and/or one or more Infantry Companies in the army, or fielded as a single formation of their own.

army_notes.name: Companies
army_notes.text: A Deathworld Veterans Imperial Guard army may contain any number of Companies.

army_notes.name: Company Upgrades
army_notes.text: Up to three company upgrades may be added to each Deathworld Veterans Company, once per Company.

army_notes.name: Support Formations
army_notes.text: Up to two support formations may be taken for each Deathworld Veterans Company.

army_notes.name: Naval Support
army_notes.text: Up to 1/3 of army points may be spent on Naval Support.

army_notes.name: Upgradeable Valkyrie Transport
army_notes.text: Infantry Platoon, Fire Support Platoon, Missile Team, Snipers, and Ogryns upgrades may include up to 3 Valkyries for +50 points each, up to minimum transport requirement.

army_notes.name: Air Cavalry Upgrade Restrictions
army_notes.text: Armor Support, Hellhounds, and Hydra upgrades may not be added to a Deathworld Air Cavalry Company.

extraction_warnings: Source extracted from the local PDF C:/Users/fliff/Downloads/Catachan 2.7 (2).pdf via pypdf plain-text extraction.
source_url was left null because no reliable Catachan Deathworld Veterans source URL was confirmed from the repository during this task.
The user initially mentioned IG_cadian_NETEA, but this PDF is Catachan Deathworld Veterans and the existing repo list id IG_catachan_NETEA was used instead.
Orbital Support was split into separate Lunar Class Cruiser and Emperor Class Battleship formation entries because the source prints explicit alternatives with distinct costs.
The Marauder Bomber row lost some columns in plain-text extraction; its speed and defence values were aligned to the same standard Marauder Bomber profile already present elsewhere in the repo.
